summary: RFC-002 Authentication, AI Features, and Import Wizard testing completed. All 29 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified login page, demo accounts, logout, protected routes, Import Wizard, Invoices, and Vendors pages.
seed_data_creation: Demo accounts created during testing (demo-admin, demo-dispatcher, demo-tech, demo-sales)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RFC-002 Auth, AI, and Import features fully tested. All authentication flows working (JWT login, demo accounts, Google OAuth button present). AI endpoints (job-summary, scheduling-suggestions, predictive-maintenance) working with Gemini 2.0 Flash. Import Wizard UI and backend templates/validation working. Invoices and Vendors pages fully functional.

authentication.login_page_ui: PASS - Email/password form, demo buttons, Google OAuth button all present
authentication.demo_admin_login: PASS - Redirects to dashboard with welcome message
authentication.protected_routes: PASS - Unauthenticated users redirected to login
authentication.jwt_auth_me: PASS - Returns user profile with valid token
authentication.google_oauth_button: PASS - Button present and clickable, redirects to auth.emergentagent.com

ai_features.job_summary_endpoint: PASS - Returns AI-generated summary using Gemini 2.0 Flash

import_wizard.ui_step1_data_type_selection: PASS - All 5 import types displayed (Customers, Leads, Jobs, Inventory, Equipment)
import_wizard.ui_step2_file_upload: PASS - Download Template button and file upload area present
import_wizard.validate_customers: PASS - Validates records and returns valid/invalid counts

invoices_page.page_load: PASS - Title, metrics, tabs all present
invoices_page.metrics_cards: PASS - Total Invoices, Outstanding, Collected, Overdue
invoices_page.invoices_tab: PASS - Shows invoice list with search and filter

vendors_page.page_load: PASS - Title, metrics, tabs all present
vendors_page.metrics_cards: PASS - Active Vendors, Total POs, Pending, Total Value
vendors_page.vendors_tab: PASS - Shows vendor cards with search
vendors_page.purchase_orders_tab: PASS - Shows PO list with status filter
